name: geox-water
description: Water and hydrology specialist. Models flood, watershed, drainage, and tidal processes for earth intelligence operations.

skills.name: Flood Modeling
skills.description: Simulate flood extent and depth from rainfall or breach

skills.name: Watershed Delineation
skills.description: Delineate watershed boundaries and stream networks

skills.name: Drainage Analysis
skills.description: Analyze flow accumulation, direction, and drainage patterns

skills.name: Tidal Modeling
skills.description: Model tidal heights, currents, and storm surge
